framework.name: GNAP Client-as-Autonomous-Agent Pattern
framework.description: GNAP explicitly supports the client running 'autonomously on behalf of a resource owner' — not just user-present flows. This is the AI agent delegation use case. The spec already models software acting without a human in the loop, constrained by pre-granted privileges.
framework.raw_quote: The client is operated by the end user, or it runs autonomously on behalf of a resource owner.

source.title: RFC 9635 - Grant Negotiation and Authorization Protocol (GNAP)
